---
title: "Breakout Game"
image: featured.jpg
/*image-alt:
categories:
  - Object Oriented Programming
  - Java
  - Event Handlers
date: 2023-09-30
about: 
  template: broadside
  image: featured.jpg
---

For one of our Object Oriented Programming homework assignments, we were tasked to create a version of the game breakout from the ground up, I found it to be a fun exercise!

[Github Repo](https://github.com/mcliffo1/Breakout)
